creator: mac@flab.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
From: Bill Fumerola <billf@chc-chimes.com>
Subject: Re: ports/9022: Update ports: x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n 0.20.3
Date: Tue, 8 Dec 1998 16:25:44 -0500 (EST)
Message-ID: <Pine.HPP.3.96.981208162327.15101C-100000@hp9000.chc-chimes.com>

billf> I stopped as soon as I saw this. Updates NEED to be submitted in diff
billf> (preferably in unified format). Anything else is just overkill and
billf> bothersome.

Sorry, I don't know that. 
I post unified diff attatched this.
Thank you for your advice.

-- 
mac@jp.freebsd.org/mac@flab.fujistu.co.jp

diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/Makefile ./windowmaker-i18n/Makefile
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/Makefile	Tue Dec  8 09:25:14 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/Makefile	Wed Dec  9 10:11:37 1998
@@ -1,20 +1,20 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	WindowMaker with i18n extention
-# Version required:	0.20.2
+# Version required:	0.20.3
 # Date created:		24 Nov 1998
 # Whom:			mac@jp.freebsd.org
 #
-# $Id: Makefile,v 1.43 1998/12/05 10:41:03 flathill Exp $
+# $Id: Makefile,v 1.42 1998/11/25 23:05:42 asami Exp $
 
-DISTNAME=	WindowMaker-0.20.2
-PKGNAME=	windowmaker-i18n-0.20.2
+DISTNAME=	WindowMaker-0.20.3
+PKGNAME=	windowmaker-i18n-0.20.3
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.windowmaker.org/pub/beta/srcs/ \
 		ftp://ftp.io.com/pub/mirror/windowmaker/beta/srcs/ \
 		http://jgo.local.net/cool_downloads/wm/ \
-		http://www.itlb.te.noda.sut.ac.jp/~manome/wmaker/archive/ \
-		ftp://ftp.kr.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-kr/misc/wmaker/
-DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${DATAFILES} setlinguas-0.4.gz \
-		WindowMaker-0.20.2-ko.po.gz WPrefs-0.20.2-ko.po.gz
+		ftp://ftp.kr.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-kr/misc/wmaker/ 
+DISTFILES=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${DATAFILES} \
+		WindowMaker-0.20.3-ko.po.gz WPrefs-0.20.3-ko.po.gz 
+EXTRACT_ONLY=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${DATAFILES}
 
 MAINTAINER=	mac@jp.freebsd.org
 
@@ -26,18 +26,15 @@
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/libintl.a:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gettext \
 		nkf:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/nkf
 
-EXTRACT_ONLY=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX} ${DATAFILES}
-
 USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ENV=	X11BASE=${X11BASE} LOCALBASE=${LOCALBASE}\
+CONFIGURE_ENV=	X11BASE=${X11BASE}  LOCALBASE=${LOCALBASE} \
 		LINGUAS="de es fi fr hr it ja_JP.EUC ja_JP.SJIS ko nl no pl pt ru"
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-pixmapdir=${PREFIX}/include/X11/pixmaps \
 	--with-nlsdir=${PREFIX}/share/locale \
 	--with-gfx-libs="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib" \
-	--with-gfx-incs="-I${LOCALBASE}/include/tiff34 -I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
+	--with-gfx-incs="-I${LOCALBASE}/include -I${LOCALBASE}/include/giflib" \
 	--disable-debug --enable-kanji
-MAKE_ENV=	LOCALBASE=${LOCALBASE}
 
 MAN1=	geticonset.1x getstyle.1x seticons.1x setstyle.1x \
 	wdwrite.1x wmaker.1x wmsetbg.1x wxcopy.1x wxpaste.1x
@@ -47,15 +44,15 @@
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 post-extract:
-	@${GUNZIP_CMD} -c < ${_DISTDIR}/setlinguas-0.4.gz > ${WRKDIR}/setlinguas
-	@${GUNZIP_CMD} -c < ${_DISTDIR}/WindowMaker-0.20.2-ko.po.gz > ${WRKSRC}/po/ko.po
-	@${GUNZIP_CMD} -c < ${_DISTDIR}/WPrefs-0.20.2-ko.po.gz > ${WRKSRC}/WPrefs.app/po/ko.po
+	@${GUNZIP_CMD} -c < ${_DISTDIR}/WindowMaker-0.20.3-ko.po.gz \
+			> ${WRKSRC}/po/ko.po
+	@${GUNZIP_CMD} -c < ${_DISTDIR}/WPrefs-0.20.3-ko.po.gz \
+			> ${WRKSRC}/WPrefs.app/po/ko.po
 
 post-patch:
 	@perl -pi -e "s|%%PREFIX%%|${PREFIX}|g" ${WRKSRC}/WPrefs.app/Paths.c
 
 post-install:
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/setlinguas ${PREFIX}/bin
 	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/WindowMaker/Pixmaps/
 	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/WindowMaker/Sounds/
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/WindowMaker-data/pixmaps/* \
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/files/md5 ./windowmaker-i18n/files/md5
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/files/md5	Tue Dec  8 09:25:15 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/files/md5	Wed Dec  9 10:12:07 1998
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
-MD5 (WindowMaker-0.20.2.tar.gz) = 26f92b4697238911f51566530f1915a3
+MD5 (WindowMaker-0.20.3.tar.gz) = fb79baa4ae084a0747a5d3683eebc686
 MD5 (WindowMaker-data.tar.gz) = 6ea0c37314ea9e9ab27e8bdf45a31a82
-MD5 (setlinguas-0.4.gz) = 21b3e4bb93b730f1c5f72bd9d73aae42
-MD5 (WindowMaker-0.20.2-ko.po.gz) = daf05a48c3a2445f7935a8142a029a5f
-MD5 (WPrefs-0.20.2-ko.po.gz) = b49a72d95984b7ced07696cc7fd61566
+MD5 (WindowMaker-0.20.3-ko.po.gz) = d2a0881ad7de172168f1fc94945d02cc
+MD5 (WPrefs-0.20.3-ko.po.gz) = d8f2508b75d7edcbb17a59c9abb04a54
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aa ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aa
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aa	Fri Oct 30 17:24:36 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aa	Wed Dec  9 10:11:09 1998
@@ -1,25 +1,13 @@
---- WINGs/Makefile.in.orig	Mon Oct 26 18:25:13 1998
-+++ WINGs/Makefile.in	Mon Oct 26 18:24:34 1998
-@@ -93,8 +93,8 @@
- 
+--- WINGs/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Nov 27 04:26:49 1998
++++ WINGs/Makefile.in	Thu Dec  3 11:06:48 1998
+@@ -95,8 +95,8 @@
  SUBDIRS = Resources
  
--LIBLIST= -L$(top_builddir)/wrlib -lwraster @XLFLAGS@ @GFXLIBS@ @XLIBS@ \
+ LIBLIST= -L$(top_builddir)/wrlib -lwraster\
+-	 @GFXLFLAGS@ @XLFLAGS@ @GFXLIBS@ @XLIBS@ \
 -	-lm -L$(top_builddir)/libPropList -lPropList
-+LIBLIST= -L$(top_builddir)/wrlib -lwraster @XLFLAGS@ @GFXLIBS@ \
++	 @GFXLFLAGS@ @XLFLAGS@ @GFXLIBS@ \
 +	-lm -L$(top_builddir)/libPropList -lPropList @XLIBS@
  
  lib_LIBRARIES = libWINGs.a
  
-@@ -165,9 +165,9 @@
- 	memory.c \
- 	usleep.c
- 
--INCLUDES = @XCFLAGS@ -I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib -I$(top_srcdir)/src \
-+INCLUDES = -I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib -I$(top_srcdir)/src \
- 	-DRESOURCE_PATH=\"$(datadir)/WINGs\" $(GFXFLAGS) -DDEBUG \
--	-I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList
-+	-I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList @XCFLAGS@
- mkinstalldirs = $(SHELL) $(top_srcdir)/mkinstalldirs
- CONFIG_HEADER = ../src/config.h
- CONFIG_CLEAN_FILES = 
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ab ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ab
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ab	Tue Dec  8 09:25:15 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ab	Wed Dec  9 10:11:08 1998
@@ -1,25 +1,12 @@
---- src/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Nov 20 12:12:05 1998
-+++ src/Makefile.in	Fri Nov 20 12:07:13 1998
-@@ -191,17 +191,18 @@
- 	-DPIXMAPDIR="\"$(pixmapdir)\"" 
- 
+--- src/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Nov 27 20:21:16 1998
++++ src/Makefile.in	Sat Dec  5 22:29:36 1998
+@@ -193,7 +193,8 @@
  INCLUDES = \
--	@XCFLAGS@ \
  	-I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList \
  	-I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib \
--	-I$(top_srcdir)/WINGs 
--
+-	-I$(top_srcdir)/WINGs @XCFLAGS@ 
 +	-I$(top_srcdir)/WINGs \
-+	-I${LOCALBASE}/include \
-+	@XCFLAGS@
-+ 
++	-I${LOCALBASE}/include @XCFLAGS@ 
+ 
  wmaker_LDADD = \
  	-L$(top_builddir)/WINGs -lWINGs\
- 	-L$(top_builddir)/wrlib -lwraster\
- 	-L$(top_builddir)/libPropList -lPropList\
--	@XLFLAGS@ \
- 	@GFXLIBS@ \
-+	@XLFLAGS@ \
- 	@XLIBS@ \
- 	@X_EXTRA_LIBS@ \
- 	@INTLIBS@ \
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ad ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ad
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ad	Tue Dec  8 09:25:15 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ad	Wed Dec  9 10:11:09 1998
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
---- configure.orig	Fri Oct 23 21:49:55 1998
-+++ configure	Sun Nov 22 21:44:52 1998
-@@ -2000,7 +2000,7 @@
+--- configure.orig	Fri Nov 27 20:24:31 1998
++++ configure	Sat Dec  5 21:46:08 1998
+@@ -2012,7 +2012,7 @@
    echo $ac_n "(cached) $ac_c" 1>&6
  else
    ac_save_LIBS="$LIBS"
 -LIBS="-lintl  $LIBS"
-+LIBS="-L$LOCALBASE/lib -lintl  $LIBS"
++LIBS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib -lintl  $LIBS"
  cat > conftest.$ac_ext <<EOF
- #line 2006 "configure"
+ #line 2018 "configure"
  #include "confdefs.h"
-@@ -2100,8 +2100,8 @@
+@@ -2112,8 +2112,8 @@
  
  
  
@@ -20,21 +20,12 @@
  
  for lang in $LINGUAS; do
  	ok=0
-@@ -3678,7 +3678,7 @@
-   echo $ac_n "(cached) $ac_c" 1>&6
- else
-   ac_save_LIBS="$LIBS"
--LIBS="-lgif $GFX_INC_PATH $GFX_LIB_PATH $XLFLAGS $LIBS"
-+LIBS="-lgif $GFX_INC_PATH $GFX_LIB_PATH $XLFLAGS $XLIBS $LIBS"
- cat > conftest.$ac_ext <<EOF
- #line 3684 "configure"
- #include "confdefs.h"
-@@ -4178,7 +4178,7 @@
+@@ -4151,7 +4151,7 @@
  #include "confdefs.h"
  #include <$ac_hdr>
  EOF
 -ac_try="$ac_cpp conftest.$ac_ext >/dev/null 2>conftest.out"
-+ac_try="$ac_cpp -I$LOCALBASE/include conftest.$ac_ext >/dev/null 2>conftest.out"
- { (eval echo configure:4183: \"$ac_try\") 1>&5; (eval $ac_try) 2>&5; }
++ac_try="$ac_cpp -I${LOCALBASE}/include conftest.$ac_ext >/dev/null 2>conftest.out"
+ { (eval echo configure:4156: \"$ac_try\") 1>&5; (eval $ac_try) 2>&5; }
  ac_err=`grep -v '^ *+' conftest.out`
  if test -z "$ac_err"; then
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ae ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ae
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ae	Fri Oct 30 17:24:36 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ae	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
---- util/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Oct 23 15:02:24 1998
-+++ util/Makefile.in	Mon Oct 26 18:47:23 1998
-@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@
- 
- EXTRA_DIST = wmaker.inst.in bughint wm-oldmenu2new
- 
--INCLUDES = @DFLAGS@ @XCFLAGS@ -I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib -I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList @GFXFLAGS@ 
-+INCLUDES = @DFLAGS@ -I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib -I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList @GFXFLAGS@ @XCFLAGS@
- 
- # X_EXTRA_LIBS is for libproplist in systems that need -lsocket 
- liblist= -L$(top_builddir)/libPropList -lPropList @X_EXTRA_LIBS@ 
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-af ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-af
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-af	Fri Sep 11 15:46:52 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-af	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
---- wrlib/gif.c.orig	Thu Sep 10 17:57:31 1998
-+++ wrlib/gif.c	Thu Sep 10 17:53:51 1998
-@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@
- #include <stdio.h>
- #include <string.h>
- 
--#include <gif_lib.h>
-+#include <giflib/gif_lib.h>
- 
- #include "wraster.h"
- 
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ai ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ai
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ai	Mon Nov  2 17:08:09 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ai	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
---- WINGs/wevent.c.orig	Wed Oct 21 14:43:55 1998
-+++ WINGs/wevent.c	Mon Oct 26 00:05:25 1998
-@@ -387,6 +387,10 @@
-     } else {
- 	delay->tv_sec = timerHandler->when.tv_sec - now.tv_sec;
- 	delay->tv_usec = timerHandler->when.tv_usec - now.tv_usec;
-+	if (delay->tv_usec < 0) {
-+	    delay->tv_usec += 1000000;
-+	    delay->tv_sec--;
-+	}
-     }
- }
-
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aj ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aj
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aj	Thu Nov 26 02:07:43 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-aj	Wed Dec  9 10:11:09 1998
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
---- WPrefs.app/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Nov 10 18:08:10 1998
-+++ WPrefs.app/Makefile.in	Tue Nov 10 18:07:31 1998
-@@ -139,6 +139,7 @@
- INCLUDES = \
+--- WPrefs.app/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Nov 27 20:25:03 1998
++++ WPrefs.app/Makefile.in	Sat Dec  5 22:21:25 1998
+@@ -141,6 +141,7 @@
  	-I$(top_srcdir)/wrlib \
  	-I$(top_srcdir)/WINGs \
-+	-I/usr/local/include \
- 	@XCFLAGS@ \
- 	-I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList
+ 	-I$(top_srcdir)/libPropList \
++	-I${LOCALBASE}/include \
+ 	@XCFLAGS@ 
  
+ WPrefs_DEPENDENCIES = $(top_builddir)/WINGs/libWINGs.a
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ak ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ak
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ak	Thu Nov 26 02:07:43 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ak	Wed Dec  9 10:11:09 1998
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
---- po/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Oct 23 22:02:30 1998
-+++ po/Makefile.in	Sun Nov 22 22:04:06 1998
-@@ -215,6 +215,11 @@
+--- po/Makefile.in.orig	Sat Dec  5 21:56:08 1998
++++ po/Makefile.in	Sat Dec  5 21:56:36 1998
+@@ -216,12 +216,17 @@
  clean-generic maintainer-clean-generic clean mostlyclean distclean \
  maintainer-clean
  
@@ -11,4 +11,12 @@
 +	nkf -e ja.po > ja_JP.SJIS.po
  
  .po.mo: 
- 	msgfmt -o $@ $<
+-	msgfmt -o $@ $<
++	${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt -o $@ $<
+ 
+ WindowMaker.pot: $(POTFILES)
+-	xgettext --default-domain=WindowMaker \
++	${LOCALBASE}/bin/xgettext --default-domain=WindowMaker \
+ 	--add-comments --keyword=_ $(POTFILES)
+ 	if cmp -s WindowMaker.po WindowMaker.pot; then \
+ 	    rm -f WindowMaker.po; \
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-al ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-al
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-al	Thu Nov 26 02:07:43 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-al	Wed Dec  9 10:11:08 1998
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
---- WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Oct 23 22:03:53 1998
-+++ WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in	Sun Nov 22 22:05:50 1998
-@@ -205,6 +205,11 @@
+--- WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in.orig	Sat Dec  5 21:56:20 1998
++++ WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in	Sat Dec  5 21:56:36 1998
+@@ -206,12 +206,17 @@
  clean-generic maintainer-clean-generic clean mostlyclean distclean \
  maintainer-clean
  
@@ -11,4 +11,12 @@
 +	nkf -e ja.po > ja_JP.SJIS.po
  
  .po.mo: 
- 	msgfmt -o $@ $<
+-	msgfmt -o $@ $<
++	${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt -o $@ $<
+ 
+ WPrefs.pot: $(POTFILES)
+-	xgettext --default-domain=WPrefs \
++	${LOCALBASE}/bin/xgettext --default-domain=WPrefs \
+ 	--add-comments --keyword=_ $(POTFILES)
+ 	if cmp -s WPrefs.po WPrefs.pot; then \
+ 	    rm -f WPrefs.po; \
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ba ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ba
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ba	Sat Dec  5 19:41:03 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-ba	Wed Dec  9 10:11:09 1998
@@ -1,15 +1,7 @@
---- po/Makefile.in.orig	Sat Nov 21 17:29:45 1998
-+++ po/Makefile.in	Sat Nov 21 17:29:14 1998
-@@ -217,10 +217,10 @@
- 
- 
- .po.mo: 
--	msgfmt -o $@ $<
-+	${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt -o $@ $<
- 
- WindowMaker.pot: $(POTFILES)
--	xgettext --default-domain=WindowMaker \

- 	--add-comments --keyword=_ $(POTFILES)
- 	if cmp -s WindowMaker.po WindowMaker.pot; then \
- 	    rm -f WindowMaker.po; \
+--- WPrefs.app/po/hr.po.orig	Sun Dec  6 19:24:24 1998
++++ WPrefs.app/po/hr.po	Sun Dec  6 19:24:29 1998
+@@ -1265,4 +1265,3 @@
+ #: ../../WPrefs.app/main.c:121
+ msgid "could not initialize application"
+ msgstr "nelze inicializovat aplikaci"
+-\ No newline at end of file
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-bb ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-bb
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-bb	Sat Dec  5 19:41:03 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/patches/patch-bb	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
@@ -1,15 +0,0 @@
---- WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in.orig	Sat Nov 21 20:34:22 1998
-+++ WPrefs.app/po/Makefile.in	Sat Nov 21 20:34:33 1998
-@@ -207,10 +207,10 @@
- 
- 
- .po.mo: 
--	msgfmt -o $@ $<
-+	${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt -o $@ $<
- 
- WPrefs.pot: $(POTFILES)
--	xgettext --default-domain=WPrefs \
-+	${LOCALBASE}/bin/xgettext --default-domain=WPrefs \
- 	--add-comments --keyword=_ $(POTFILES)
- 	if cmp -s WPrefs.po WPrefs.pot; then \

diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/pkg/DESCR ./windowmaker-i18n/pkg/DESCR
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/pkg/DESCR	Wed Nov 25 19:44:01 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/pkg/DESCR	Wed Dec  9 10:13:30 1998
@@ -6,6 +6,9 @@
 Windowmanager that requires no editing of messy configuration files.
 
 This port based on x11-wm/windowmaker ports skelton, enhanced i18n. 
-If use first, execute "wmaker.inst" and "setlinguas you_choosed_language".
+If use first, execute "wmaker.inst" and "wsetfont you_choosed_language".
 you_choosed_language is example "japanese", "korean", etc. More info about 
-setlinguas, see help of setlinguas.
+wsetfont, see help of wsetfont.
+
+If you use with xdm, set your LANG enviroment variable in your .xsession. 
+
diff -urN -x CVS -x work ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/pkg/PLIST ./windowmaker-i18n/pkg/PLIST
--- ../x11-wm/windowmaker-i18n/pkg/PLIST	Wed Nov 25 19:44:01 1998
+++ ./windowmaker-i18n/pkg/PLIST	Wed Dec  9 10:11:08 1998
@@ -117,7 +117,6 @@
 GNUstep/Apps/WPrefs.app/xpm/xis.xpm
 bin/geticonset
 bin/getstyle
-bin/setlinguas
 bin/seticons
 bin/setstyle
 bin/wdwrite
@@ -125,6 +124,7 @@
 bin/wmaker
 bin/wmaker.inst
 bin/wmsetbg
+bin/wsetfont
 bin/wxcopy
 bin/wxpaste
 include/WINGs.h
